hero.description: Multiple CucumberHTML Reporter is built on the belief that technical precision should be accessible to everyone. Your sponsorship directly funds independent development, ensuring the ecosystem remains modern, secure, and sustainable for the long term.

benefits.title: Faster Core Development
benefits.description: Sponsorship allows our core maintainers to dedicate full-time hours to performance optimizations and new feature implementations.

benefits.title: Editorial Quality Docs
benefits.description: We believe documentation is a first-class feature. Funds help us maintain high-fidelity tutorials and API references.

benefits.title: Security Audits
benefits.description: Dedicated maintenance includes quarterly security sweeps and dependency hardening.

benefits.title: Priority Bug Fixes
benefits.description: Community-reported issues are triaged and resolved with precision, ensuring the stable branch remains production-ready at all times for enterprises and individuals alike.

tiers.title: Choose Your Tier
tiers.description: Support the project at a level that fits your contribution capacity. Every bit counts towards engineering excellence.

items.name: 🚶🏻 Starter
features: You get a shoutout on my Socials
Get your name listed on my personal website

items.name: 🤝 Backer
features: Get your name listed on README of all my repositories

items.name: 🥉 Bronze
features: Get special sponsor role on my Discord server with access to private sponsor channel where you will get priority over other discussions

items.name: 🥈 Silver
features: Get 30 minutes / month of call with me anytime during the month for any consulting or mentorship

items.name: 🥇 Gold
features: Get 1 hour / month of call with me anytime during the month for any consulting or mentorship

items.name: 💎 Diamond
features: Get 4 hour / month of call with me anytime during the month for any consulting or mentorship

items.name: 👑 Platinum
features: Get 12 hour / month call with me anytime during the month for any consulting or mentorship

curators.title: Meet the Curators
curators.description: The organizations and individuals keeping the project alive.

licenses.title: Software License Sponsors
licenses.description: We are extremely grateful to the following companies who provide paid licenses of their professional software tools to support open source development.

items.question: Where does the money go?
items.answer: 100% of funds (after platform fees) go towards project expenses: paying maintainers for focused dev time, hosting our documentation infrastructure, and sponsoring upstream dependencies we rely on.

items.question: Can I manage or cancel my sponsorship?
items.answer: Yes, all billing is handled through GitHub Sponsors. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your recurring contribution at any time through the dashboard.

cta.title: Ready to curate the future with us?
